beforeAfterTeaser.title: A real Sydney kitchen that shows what better planning actually does.
beforeAfterTeaser.text: This Willoughby kitchen shows how layout thinking, proper storage planning and considered finish selection can completely change how a room works and feels. The footprint did not change — the approach did. Explore the projects page to see more before-and-after work across kitchens, wardrobes, laundries and broader renovation scopes.

serviceAreasTeaser.title: Sydney-wide — from the Eastern Suburbs to the Hills District and everywhere in between.
serviceAreasTeaser.intro: We work across all of Sydney including the Lower North Shore, Eastern Suburbs, Inner West, Hills District, South West and surrounding suburbs. Kitchen renovations, wardrobes and custom joinery — same standard of work regardless of where the job is.
serviceAreasTeaser.bodyText: Start with our main service areas page or jump straight into suburb pages for selected locations below.
